audit_notes: Sprint 9: PoolHistoryPoint and TokenHistoryPoint added. PoolDayData retained for backward compatibility.
fee_gas_ratio returns RATIO('0') not inf when gas_cost is zero -- callers must handle
All financial params use float instead of Decimal
Hardcoded defaults should come from config/default.yaml

Sprint 18: Float functions retained for reporter. New Decimal scorer metric functions added: rolling_window, annualized_vol_30d, fee_apr_from_records, volume_tvl_ratio_from_records, net_lp_alpha_from_records, compute_entry_metrics. Duplicate max_drawdown alias retained but flagged.

Sprint 17: Migrated to Decimal throughout. Weights from config/default.yaml scoring section. PoolScorer class with normalize/score methods. compute_pool_score pure function. hard_gate_alpha for negative alpha filter. classify_risk_tier for anchor/satellite/speculative. rank_pools sorted descending.

Sprint 17: Migrated to Decimal throughout. Thresholds from config/default.yaml signals section. Four signal functions (drawdown, momentum_crash, tvl_collapse, il_fee_ratio). Wrapper classes for each. any_exit_signal aggregates all.

Sprint 17: Migrated to Decimal throughout. Thresholds from config/default.yaml regime section. RegimeClassifier class. classify_regime returns four regimes. optimal_range_width and allocation_adjustment helpers. regime_summary full analysis dict.
PositionSimulator.step() implemented -- accepts PoolDayData
fee attribution is proportional model -- does not use feeGrowthGlobal yet
price range width is entry_price x multiplier -- not config-driven yet
HOTFIX: summary() IL price bug fixed -- last_price field added to Position
Includes regression test for summary() IL price bug (test_summary_il_uses_last_price_not_value_ratio)
Sprint 1: All financial params use float instead of Decimal. Hardcoded defaults should come from config/default.yaml backtest section.

Sprint 19: Migrated to Decimal throughout. Defaults wired to BacktestConfig values. Latent BacktestSimulator import bug fixed (was PositionSimulator). summary() uses Decimal quantize. equity_df() converts to float at display boundary only.
All methods raise NotImplementedError -- live execution not implemented in v2 yet
Sprint 9: Generalized abstract base to support hourly history fetchers. Docstrings updated.
api_key read from THEGRAPH_API_KEY env var -- silently uses empty string if not set, which will produce 401 on authenticated endpoints
Sprint 8: FetchError logs response body; URL supports {api_key} path substitution.
Sprint 9-hotfix2: Daily records expanded to 24 hourly PoolHistoryPoint records.
TVL always Decimal('0') -- source limitation
fee_growth_global always None -- source limitation
price_token1_in_token0 is USD proxy for token1 not true intra-pool ratio
Requires COIN_ID_MAP update when new tokens added to registry
Sprint 9-hotfix2: Daily records expanded to 24 hourly PoolHistoryPoint records.
Sprint 9-hotfix2: Daily TVL snapshots expanded to 24 hourly PoolHistoryPoint records.
Sprint 9: save_pool_history accepts both PoolDayData (date field) and PoolHistoryPoint (timestamp field). JSON output includes timestamp for hourly records.
Hotfix 3: PoolHistoryPoint serialized to flat hourly array.
Sprint 10: pool_address hoisted to wrapper root; stripped from per-row records; load path injects it back.
Sprint 22: Atomic write block consolidated -- mkdir(parents=True) + os.replace() now unified for both hourly and daily branches.
Sprint 9: Persists token history to data/token_history/*.json.
Sprint 10: Save/load TokenHistoryPoint to data/prices/{SYMBOL}.json with wrapper schema.
CoinGecko token USD history fetcher. Normalizes to TokenHistoryPoint for trend and exit logic.
Sprint 9-hotfix2: Replaced market_chart_range (Pro-only) with free-tier market_chart?days=N&interval=hourly.
Hotfix 1: 90d chunk pagination via market_chart/range; uppercase COIN_ID_MAP aliases added.
Sprint 14: PoolConfig gains tick_lower/tick_upper sentinel defaults (-887272/887272).
Sprint 14: Tick fields loaded from JSON; validate() checks ordering and bounds.
Sprint 9: Dual-compatible validators. Hourly gap detection (flags gaps > 7200s). Daily behavior preserved.
CoinGecko API key is empty string by default -- must be set via COINGECKO_API_KEY env var
Sprint 9: Preserves hourly timestamps from GeckoTerminal candles. Returns PoolHistoryPoint instead of PoolDayData. No daily collapse. Dedup by exact timestamp.
Sprint 9 hotfix: HTTP 401 raises RateLimitError for free-tier day limit fallback to TheGraph.
Sprint 9-hotfix2: _INTER_POOL_SLEEP increased from 10s to 30s for server-side rate limit recovery.
Legacy runner -- renamed from scripts/backtest.py to avoid shadowing backtest/ package. Sprint 22B.
BASE_RPC_HTTP and BASE_RPC_WS parked for Sprint 8+ execution modules -- not consumed yet
15 pools migrated from v1 data/registry.json
LRDS/WETH excluded -- token0 address in v1 registry appears malformed
Alt/duplicate pools excluded -- only primary address per pair retained
Sprint 14: Added tick_lower/tick_upper to all 15 pool entries; fee_tier left unchanged pending audit.
Sprint 16: fee_tier corrected for all 13 invalid pools (basis-point to ppm). All 15 pools now pass validate().

Sprint 22: Trimmed to 3 pools (USDC-WETH, WETH-cbBTC, USDC-USDT). Removed 10 pools: USDC-cbBTC, AERO-USDC, VVV-WETH, KTA-WETH, VIRTUAL-WETH, FAI-WETH, cbETH-WETH, WETH-BRETT, EURC-USDC, AERO-cbBTC, WETH-MORPHO, USDC-eUSD. Trimmed to match E2E fixture coverage before first real data run. Committed unscoped in 07df0ab.
Pure functions only. All Decimal, never float. IL formula: (2*sqrt(k)/(1+k))-1.
Frozen dataclass. Entry snapshot only -- no computation.
ExitSignal frozen dataclass + ExitReason enum.
All three stubs implemented. PRICE_OUT_OF_RANGE check added at priority 2 (after IL, before TVL). tick_to_price() from core/il.py. Sentinel ticks handled naturally.
BacktestResult gains hours_simulated (int=0) and exit_reason (str|None). print_summary() updated with new columns. save() serialises all Sprint 12 config fields and new result fields.

Sprint 20: save() now writes results/runs/{run_id}/summary.json (enriched combined) and appends to results/run_index.json. Run ID format changed to YYYYMMDD_HHMMSS_{config_hash}. BacktestResult gains entry_score field.
Fee attribution added to _simulate_pool_hourly(). Daily path updated with explicit hours_simulated=0, exit_reason=None.
Sprint 14: Hourly path now uses registry ticks and only accrues fees while in range.
Sprint 15: tick_to_price hoisted above fee loop; fee not counted on exit step.
Sprint 17: entry score gate added to _simulate_pool_hourly() -- skips pool when compute_pool_score < config.min_entry_score.
Sprint 18: Entry gate now uses compute_entry_metrics() from core.metrics - real 30d rolling window metrics replace static-zero placeholders.
Sprint 20: entry_score passed through to BacktestResult.
Sprint 21: AUDIT tag bumped sprint=18 -> sprint=21.

# AUDIT:status=complete, # AUDIT:sprint=20. RunIndexEntry frozen dataclass. RunIndex class with load/append/latest/config_hash_from_config. Atomic writes via tmp+rename. Decimal fields serialized as strings.

# AUDIT:status=complete, # AUDIT:sprint=20. PoolResult/AggregateStats/RunSummary frozen dataclasses. compare_runs() never raises -- malformed fields default to Decimal('0') with warning. load_run_summary() raises FileNotFoundError.
Sprint 22: root_path param added to load_run_summary(). Sprint 21 xfail resolved.
# AUDIT:status=complete, # AUDIT:sprint=20. Three print functions: print_run_summary, print_run_comparison, print_run_history. Stdout only -- no file I/O. Accepts deserialized objects only.
Layer 1: pure function unit tests -- symmetry, precision, field direction, edge cases.
Layer 2: loader -> calculator integration -- Decimal preservation, dual-method agreement.
Layer 3: real data smoke tests -- completeness, reciprocal consistency, fee growth monotonicity, stablecoin peg.
Full coverage -- priority order, tolerance window, join alignment, Decimal enforcement. 4 new range-exit test cases appended.
Minimal single-pool registry for integration test.
Sprint 14: Added tick_lower=-887272 and tick_upper=887272 sentinel defaults.
Sprint 14: Added tick field loading, defaults, validation, and registry.json completeness tests.
End-to-end test over WETH-USDC fixture; IL trigger fires at k=2.0.
Sprint 13: 3 new tests for fee attribution, exit_reason, and hours_simulated appended.
Sprint 14: Added full-range fee regression test and narrow-range PRICE_OUT_OF_RANGE integration test.
Copy of prices_WETH_sample.json.
Copy of prices_USDC_sample.json.
SweepConfig, SweepResult, SweepRunner. Cartesian product over 4 exit-policy parameters. Results sorted descending by avg_net_lp_alpha.
Sprint 16: run_id format aligned (removed extra _ after il prefix).
Sprint 16: test_real_registry_json_all_fee_tiers_valid() added -- asserts all 15 pools have fee_tier in {100, 500, 3000, 10000}.
Sprint 17: 22 unit tests covering compute_pool_score, hard_gate_alpha, PoolScorer, classify_risk_tier, rank_pools. Decimal only.
Sprint 17: 20 unit tests covering all signal functions and wrapper classes. Decimal only.
Sprint 17: 20 unit tests covering classify_regime, optimal_range_width, allocation_adjustment, RegimeClassifier, regime_summary. Decimal only.
Sprint 17: AUDIT sprint tag bumped from 15 to 17.
Sprint 18: Full coverage of all new Decimal scorer metric functions in core/metrics.py.
Sprint 19: 25 unit tests covering all MultiPoolBacktest methods. Decimal only inputs. equity_df float conversion verified.
SPRINT 21: E2E SMOKE TEST SUITE. 15 TESTS IN 3 CLASSES.
TestHarnessExecution (6 tests): RUN_AND_SAVE CREATES DIRS. WRITES RESULTS.JSON + SUMMARY.JSON. INDEX APPENDED. RUN_ID MATCHES CONFIG_HASH. EXIT_REASON SET. HOURS_SIMULATED > 0.

TestReporterOutput (8 tests): POOL_COUNT EQUALS THREE. ALL POOLS HAVE DECIMAL STR FIELDS. FEES POSITIVE. IL SIGN CORRECT. STABLECOIL IL NEAR ZERO. RUN PARSEABLE. ENTRY_SCORE IS STRING. DIRECT-PARSE TEST ADDED.
TestEconomicSanity (3 tests): NET_ALPHA FEES PLUS IL. EXIT REASONS VALID. FINAL CAPITAL BOUNDS.

Sprint 22: xfail REMOVED from test_e2e_summary_json_parseable_by_load_run_summary. PatchedPath body replaced with load_run_summary(run_id, root_path=tmp_path/'runs'). schema_version and pools_evaluated assertions added.
SPRINT 21: E2E FIXTURE FILES GENERATED.
tests/fixtures/generate_e2e_fixtures.py - GENERATOR SCRIPT. SYNTHETIC HOURLY DATA + TOKEN PRICES + MINI REGISTRY.
tests/fixtures/hourly_e2e/USDC-USDT.json - STABLECOIN POOL. CONSTANT PRICE. ZERO IL.
tests/fixtures/hourly_e2e/USDC-WETH.json - VOLATILE POOL. WETH WALKS +/-10%.
tests/fixtures/hourly_e2e/WETH-cbBTC.json - CORRELATED POOL. LOW IL.
tests/fixtures/prices_e2e/cbBTC.json - RENAME FROM CBBTC.json. MATCH REGISTRY CASE.
tests/fixtures/prices_e2e/USDC.json, USDT.json, WETH.json - TOKEN PRICE FIXTURES.
tests/fixtures/registry_e2e.json - MINI REGISTRY 3 POOLS.
SPRINT 22: ONE-SHOT RUNNER. REAL DATA. DAYS=30. INITIAL_CAPITAL=10000.
MIN_ENTRY_SCORE=0.05. MAX_IL_PCT=-0.50. ALL POOLS ENTER FOR FIRST VALIDATION RUN.
build_config() + make_run_id() + main(). Prints summary path + pools simulated/skipped counts.
SPRINT 25: Added --days CLI flag via argparse (default 30). max_hold_hours = days * 24. run_id format: real_YYYY-MM-DD_Nd.
